meta.title: Kerbal Space Program Reddit Challenge "Satellite Snatch"
meta.description:
This week's Reddit Kerbal Challenge was "Using a Space Shuttle, retrieve a pre-launched satellite from equatorial orbit around Kerbin, within a single orbit."

I apparently missed where it said to use a standard Space Shuttle and I also missed where it said the satellite couldn't be guided. CRAP. But check out the epic landing!

All music by Everyday Astronaut (Tim Dodd) - https://soundcloud.com/everyday-astronaut-690255155
